description: Europeana provides access to digitised cultural heritage records and media from institutions across Europe. Its services let users and developers search collections, retrieve record metadata, and work with IIIF-compatible manifests and related content.
summary: Europeana exposes public HTTP APIs for Search & Record data and IIIF content; the Search & Record API requires a Europeana-issued API key, while the IIIF APIs are documented as public with no key required.
